objective: Demonstrate a minimal skill-first Dispatch Engine dogfood run from plan import through coordinator launch, registered evidence, status, tail, and decision/blocker records.

repo_context.validation_strategy: Import this fixture plan into a target repo, render coordinator dry-run, optionally launch a fake provider CLI, register worker/reviewer/validator evidence, query status/tail, and record decision/blocker lifecycle records.

workstreams.title: Dogfood evidence loop
workstreams.scope: Use skill-first guidance and existing Dispatch Engine runtime helpers to demonstrate durable run evidence without implementing a new scheduler.

decisions.question: Should this dogfood run use a real provider CLI or the deterministic fake provider shim?
decisions.reason: The fixture is intended to be deterministic; real providers remain operator optional.

review.strategy: A registered reviewer checks the evidence shape; a registered validator records deterministic command output.
